phrases.summary: The text states that Jacob fathered (begot) Joseph. This is presented as genealogical information about Joseph’s parentage.
The text identifies Joseph as Mary’s husband, indicating Joseph’s marital relationship to Mary in the genealogy.

phrases.phrase: ἐξ ἧς ἐγεννήθη Ἰησοῦς ὁ λεγόμενος Χριστός
phrases.translation: from whom was born Jesus, the one called Christ.
phrases.summary: The text states that Mary (the referent of “ἧς”) gave birth to Jesus. It further identifies Jesus as “the one called Christ,” linking the birth to this title.
